reasoning: The control IA-4(4) focuses on identifier management, specifically ensuring no root access keys are used. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that no overly privileged roles are bound to users or service accounts, which could be equivalent to having root access. The functions focus on preventing cluster-admin bindings, enforcing least privilege, and ensuring service account tokens are not automatically mounted, which aligns with the principle of minimizing unnecessary access.
title: Identifier Management - . ]
